name: gha-repro-kit
description: Turn failed GitHub Actions logs into concise maintainer handoff packets and structured JSON for agents.

capabilities.name: Analyze a local GitHub Actions log

input.description: A failed GitHub Actions log file.

output.description: Structured failure analysis with artifacts set to null.

exitCodes.1: invalid input, unsupported option, GitHub CLI failure, or unexpected runtime error

capabilities.name: Analyze a failed GitHub Actions run

input.description: Public owner/repo plus run ID, fetched through the GitHub CLI.

output.description: Structured analysis plus report.md, summary.md, repro.sh, and analysis.json.

requirements: GitHub Actions read access for the target run

capabilities.name: Analyze one failed job from a large workflow

input.description: Public owner/repo plus failed job database ID.

output.description: Structured analysis scoped to one failed job.

requirements: GitHub Actions read access for the target job

openContributionTasks.title: Find one public failed GitHub Actions run and add it as an example
openContributionTasks.goal: Increase real-world evidence by adding one public failed GitHub Actions run that exercises gha-repro-kit on a useful failure mode.
preferredFailureTypes: runner, matrix, or language version mismatch
inputs: failed job database ID when the workflow is large
commands: gh run view RUN_ID --repo owner/repo --json jobs --jq '.jobs[] | select(.conclusion == "failure") | [.databaseId, .name] | @tsv'
acceptanceCriteria: No secrets, tokens, private URLs, or personal data are included.
notes.md says what gha-repro-kit got right, what it missed, and one next parser improvement.

safety.secretsHandling: Does not require or display API keys for the MVP.
safety.networkAccess: Only GitHub CLI fetching is used when analyzing a GitHub run or job.

whenToUse: A GitHub Actions job failed and the raw log is too long.
A maintainer needs a short PR or issue reply.
An automation needs failure class, likely command, runner, matrix, or setup-step hints.
whenNotToUse: The task requires executing the repro command automatically.
The CI system is not GitHub Actions.
The failure must be fixed without reviewing the affected source code.
agentHints.confidenceGuidance: Treat primaryFailure and failureClass as parser inferences. Use context, nearestCommand, environment, and raw log evidence before applying fixes.

x402.plannedUse: Optional pay-per-request HTTP API for hosted analysis, if a hosted service is added.

ERC-8004.plannedUse: Agent identity and discovery metadata for a CI failure analysis tool. No on-chain agentId or agentRegistry has been assigned yet.

ERC-8126.plannedUse: Endpoint or agent verification metadata if external agent calls are exposed.

ERC-8183.plannedUse: Agentic job or escrow flows for requested CI triage work, if that ecosystem stabilizes.
